<!-- FlashStudy Web Project Setup Instructions -->

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Next.js 14 web application
	- TypeScript with Tailwind CSS
	- JWT authentication matching existing backend
	- Theme system (dark/light mode)
	- Features: flashcard decks, audio, PDFs, CSV import

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
	- Create Next.js 14 project with App Router
	- Install required dependencies

- [ ] Customize the Project
	- Set up authentication context
	- Create theme provider
	- Build main pages and components
	- Integrate with MongoDB backend API

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
	- No specific extensions required

- [ ] Compile the Project
	- Install dependencies
	- Verify TypeScript compilation

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	- Create dev server task

- [ ] Launch the Project
	- Start Next.js development server

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- Update README with project details
